tasks.context: In agents/task-agent.ts: Add preprocessor that detects multi-file/multi-concern tasks in processTask() before validation. Split into subtasks if >1 file or >2 logical changes. Each subtask targets exactly 1 file with <600 char context. Emit subtask queue to planner.

In agents/planner-agent.ts: Before task assignment, calculate complexity score (file count * 10 + char count / 50). If >100, trigger decomposition via SPRINT-002-001's preprocessor. Reject tasks >150 complexity. Log gate decisions to telemetry.

tasks.context: In agents/telemetry.ts: Track metrics: original_task_complexity, subtask_count, auto_approval_rate, decomposition_trigger_count. Emit to CEO dashboard every 10 tasks. Include before/after comparison for SPRINT-001 retry.

tasks.description: Add spam blacklist table to x-admin

issues.description: File is incomplete - cuts off mid-function in handleAdd method, missing handleRemove function and entire JSX return statement
Component is non-functional - missing complete implementation of core functionality
Missing test file entirely - no Jest unit tests provided
Missing JSDoc documentation on public component interface

strengths: No invalid syntax or code fences present
Strict TypeScript typing with SpamEntry and SpamType
Comprehensive validation for email and IPv4 inputs
Duplicate-check logic to prevent redundant entries
Use of crypto.randomUUID for unique IDs with fallback
Clean date formatting with error handling
UI uses existing shared components (Button, Dialog, Table, etc.)

tasks.context: In backend/src/api/spam-blacklist.ts: Create new file with GET /spam-blacklist (list), POST /spam-blacklist (add entry), DELETE /spam-blacklist/:id. Validate email/IP format. Store in Supabase spam_blacklist table. Auth: admin only. Use error-handler middleware.

review.summary: Dual-rejected: Claude (25/100) + Codex (20/100). File is incomplete and cuts off mid-implementation. Missing critical components including route handlers, middleware integration, and proper error handling setup. | The implementation is incomplete: the router and route handlers are not defined, Supabase client initialization and dependency injection are unfinished, and admin‐only auth, error‐handler middleware integration, and actual CRUD operations are missing.

issues.description: File is incomplete - cuts off at line defining SupabaseClientFactory interface, missing actual implementation
No Express router implementation or route handlers defined despite task requiring GET, POST, DELETE endpoints
Missing integration with error-handler middleware as specified in task requirements
No admin authentication middleware implementation despite task requiring 'admin only' access
Missing actual Supabase database operations for CRUD functionality
Over-engineered with unnecessary interfaces and abstractions not requested in task spec
Hardcoded Supabase client creation instead of using existing project patterns
File ends abruptly after SupabaseClientFactory interface. No router or route handlers (GET/POST/DELETE) are implemented.
No Supabase client is instantiated or injected; Supabase operations to list, insert, or delete records are missing.
No authentication or authorization checks enforcing admin-only access on endpoints.
Error-handler middleware is not integrated into the router; exceptions won’t be properly handled.
Missing input validation enforcement in route handlers (schema definitions exist but are not applied).
